message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Ignore dated bead dump exports (*_bead_dump_*.txt), profiling data
(perf.data), SQLite scratch DBs, beads history snapshots, and bv graph
export files to keep the working tree clean across multi-agent sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -44,3 +44,20 @@ test-suite/artifacts/
 
 # Compiled test artifacts
 a.out
+
+# Bead dump exports (dated ephemeral reports)
+*_bead_dump_*.txt
+
+# Beads history snapshots
+.beads/.br_history/
+
+# Profiling data
+perf.data
+perf.data.*
+
+# Local scratch DBs
+storage.sqlite3
+storage.sqlite3-*
+
+# bv graph output
+--graph-format.svg
